mapper.select: SELECT c.challenge_id AS challengeId, c.mode_type AS modeType, c.category, c.title, c.description, c.period_days AS periodDays, c.difficulty, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.user_id AS userId, c.max_participants AS maxParticipants, COUNT(uc.user_challenge_id) AS currentParticipants FROM challenge c LEFT JOIN user_challenge uc ON c.challenge_id = uc.challenge_id AND uc.status = 'PROGRESS' WHERE c.mode_type = #{modeType} GROUP BY c.challenge_id ORDER BY currentParticipants DESC, c.created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT challenge_id AS challengeId, mode_type AS modeType, category, title, description, period_days AS periodDays, difficulty, created_at AS createdAt, user_id AS userId, max_participants AS maxParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants FROM challenge WHERE mode_type = #{modeType} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT c.challenge_id AS challengeId, c.mode_type AS modeType, c.category, c.title, c.description, c.period_days AS periodDays, c.difficulty, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.user_id AS userId, c.max_participants AS maxParticipants, c.current_participants AS currentParticipants FROM challenge c WHERE c.mode_type = #{modeType} AND c.challenge_id NOT IN ( SELECT uc.challenge_id FROM user_challenge uc WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'PROGRESS' ) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge ( mode_type, category, title, description, period_days, difficulty, user_id, max_participants, current_participants ) VALUES ( #{modeType}, #{category}, #{title}, #{description}, #{periodDays}, #{difficulty}, #{userId}, #{maxParticipants}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT challenge_id AS challengeId, mode_type AS modeType, category, title, description, period_days AS periodDays, difficulty, user_id AS userId, max_participants AS maxParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, created_at AS createdAt FROM challenge WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE challenge SET current_participants = current_participants + 1 WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND current_participants < max_participants
UPDATE challenge SET current_participants = CASE WHEN current_participants > 0 THEN current_participants - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId}
UPDATE challenge c SET c.current_participants = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_challenge uc WHERE uc.challenge_id = c.challenge_id AND uc.status = 'PROGRESS' ) WHERE c.challenge_id = #{challengeId}
